boundary_binding.action_boundary: subscription renewal cancellation within grace period
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Current source records close the exact boundary.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: grace-period clock and owner request resolved

final_answer: Source records close the exact subscription-cancellation boundary. The controlling control record ties grace-period timing, owner request, actor, scope, effective date, and system boundary to the requested action. Policy permits execution only when the current source records close the exact boundary, and no open source-record defect remains.
